svg.text: Figure 7. Entity-Relationship Diagram: Actual Table Connections
CSUCC Campus ANPR Security Monitoring System - generated from PostgreSQL foreign keys
Solid lines are enforced foreign keys. Dashed orange lines are logical ANPR engine links found in data columns but not enforced by database constraints.

g.text: logical link, not enforced by FK
1 near parent table; 0..N or 0..1 near child table.
PK = primary key, FK = foreign key, UK = unique key.
Complete column dictionary is in campus_anpr_erd_connections.md.

svg.text: Figure 7. ERD showing enforced database relationships and logical ANPR engine connections.
